message:
fix: resolve 6 clippy lints in subprocess-bridge feature modules

- connector_sdk.rs: remove needless late init, fix assigning_clones,
  suppress unused_self on integration probe (pipeline state reserved)
- mission_dispatch.rs: suppress unused_self on build_detection
- tx_execution.rs: map_or→is_some_and, clone→clone_from

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
